bead.title: bench-pr-A1: harbor-runner Docker image + shell harness-adapters + task-executor + runtime-probe + agent-leak fix
bead.description:
PROBLEM: The Go runner (cmd/bench/matrix.go) puts repo root on host PYTHONPATH at cmd/bench/matrix.go:1105 so Harbor can import scripts.benchmark.harbor_adapters.*, forcing host Python. Matrix-side Python harness adapters in scripts/benchmark/harness_adapters/{fiz,opencode,pi,cost_probe,noop,dumb_script}.py likewise require host Python. Separately, internal/serviceimpl/execute_native.go:265 silently flips PlanningMode=true whenever ToolPreset=="benchmark", leaking a runner-side concept into the agent.

ROOT CAUSE:
  - cmd/bench/matrix.go:1105 — host PYTHONPATH wiring forces Python on host
  - cmd/bench/matrix.go:1015-1025 — claude/codex spawn uses --agent-import-path against host Python
  - internal/serviceimpl/execute_native.go:265 — `PlanningMode: req.PlanningMode || req.ToolPreset == "benchmark"` couples agent planning to a runner preset

PROPOSED FIX:
  1. Build scripts/benchmark/Dockerfile.harbor-runner: FROM python:3.12-slim; pip install harbor-bench==<pinned>; COPY scripts/benchmark/harbor_adapters/ and harbor_agent.py to /app; PYTHONPATH=/app; ENTRYPOINT ["harbor"]. If pip-installable form unavailable, fall back to `pip install git+https://...`.
  2. scripts/benchmark/build-harbor-runner.sh: docker build labeled with image-content-sha = sha256 of harbor_adapters/ + harbor_agent.py + Dockerfile.harbor-runner.
  3. scripts/benchmark/task-executors/harbor: bash wrapper that `docker run --rm -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock -v $cell_dir:/output -v $tasks_dir:/tasks:ro -e FIZEAU_API_KEY ... fizeau-harbor-runner:latest run --agent-import-path $harbor_plugin --task-id $task_id --output /output`. Reads task-spec.json on stdin; writes cell_dir/result.json.
  4. scripts/benchmark/harness-adapters/{fiz,claude,codex,opencode,pi,cost-probe,noop,dumb-script}: bash ports of harness_adapters/*.py. Each executable supports `<name> install <agent-artifact-path>` → install-spec.json {install_command, artifact_source, binary_path, harbor_plugin} and `<name> command` (stdin profile JSON) → command-spec.json {command, env, secret_env_keys}. Each file starts with `# SUMMARY:` header line.
  5. scripts/benchmark/harness-adapters/fiz: read sampling.planning_mode (default false); append `--plan` to command when true.
  6. scripts/benchmark/runtime-probe.sh: case on profile.metadata.runtime; curl+jq against lucebox|llamacpp|vllm|omlx|ds4|rapid-mlx endpoints; emit {name,version,commit,endpoint}.
  7. scripts/benchmark/task-executors/CONTRACT.md and scripts/benchmark/harness-adapters/CONTRACT.md: document JSON shapes + `# SUMMARY:` convention.
  8. internal/serviceimpl/execute_native.go:265 — delete `|| req.ToolPreset == "benchmark"`. PlanningMode flows only from req.PlanningMode.
  9. Add sampling.planning_mode:bool default false to profile YAML schema docs (in CONTRACT.md). Migrate every profile under scripts/benchmark/profiles/ that today relies on the preset (identify via `rg -l 'preset.*benchmark|FIZEAU_PRESET' scripts/benchmark/profiles/`) by adding sampling.planning_mode: true.

NON-SCOPE (deferred to other PRs, preserved from parent):
  - cell-report.schema.json (PR B)
  - tasks_from / task_executor bench-set schema (PR C)
  - Node collector (PR D); Node importers (PR E); deleting cmd/bench (PR F); docs (PR G)
  - Bash runner script itself (A2)
  - Concurrency / signals / budget (A3)
  - Parity fixtures (A4)

GOVERNING: plan-2026-05-15-benchmark-runner-simplification.

ACCEPTANCE (numbered, with named test symbols + gates):
  1. TestExecuteNativeRemovesBenchmarkPresetPlanning (internal/serviceimpl/execute_native_test.go): builds a Request with ToolPreset="benchmark" and PlanningMode=false, asserts resolved PlanningMode==false; with PlanningMode=true, asserts true. Run: `go test ./internal/serviceimpl/... -run TestExecuteNativeRemovesBenchmarkPresetPlanning`.
  2. `grep -n 'ToolPreset == "benchmark"' internal/serviceimpl/execute_native.go` returns nothing.
  3. test_harness_adapters.bats / test_harness_adapters.sh function test_fiz_command_emits_plan_flag_when_planning_mode_true: pipes a profile JSON with sampling.planning_mode:true into `./harness-adapters/fiz command`, jq asserts `.command | index("--plan")` non-null; with false, null.
  4. test_harness_adapters function test_each_adapter_has_summary_header: for each of fiz,claude,codex,opencode,pi,cost-probe,noop,dumb-script: `head -3 harness-adapters/$a | grep -q '^# SUMMARY:'`.
  5. test_harbor_image function test_build_sha_label_matches_content: ./build-harbor-runner.sh; `docker inspect -f '{{index .Config.Labels "image-content-sha"}}' fizeau-harbor-runner:latest` equals `sha256sum harbor_adapters/* harbor_agent.py Dockerfile.harbor-runner | sha256sum | awk '{print $1}'`.
  6. test_runtime_probe function test_runtime_probe_emits_model_server_shape: against a mocked HTTP server, runtime-probe.sh emits JSON with keys name,version,commit,endpoint.
  7. CONTRACT.md files exist at task-executors/CONTRACT.md and harness-adapters/CONTRACT.md, each documenting install-spec and command-spec JSON shapes.

GATES: `go test ./...` green; `lefthook run pre-commit` green; bash tests run via `bash scripts/benchmark/test/run.sh`.
bead.acceptance: All 7 ACs in description pass; go test + lefthook gates green.
